Error Test Case - Multiple Issues
ErrorTest
0                                  ! NFOVER
0                                  ! NABOUT
1000                               ! NSCREEN
0                                  ! IHOT
2                                  ! ICS
0                                  ! IM
2 2 1 0                            ! NOLIBF NOLIFA NOLICA NOLICAT
0                                  ! NWP (mismatch - NOLIBF=2 but no manning's n)
1                                  ! NCOR
1                                  ! NTIP
0                                  ! NWS
1                                  ! NRAMP
9.81                               ! G
0.03                               ! TAU0
-1.0                               ! DTDP (invalid - negative)
0.0                                ! STATIM
0.0                                ! REFTIM
-5.0                               ! RNDAY (invalid - negative)
0.0                                ! DRAMP (warning - ramp enabled but zero duration)
0.50 0.30 0.30                     ! A00 B00 C00 (sum > 1.0)
0.0                                ! H0 (invalid - zero with NOLIFA=2)
0.0 0.0                            ! SLAM0 SFEA0 (warning - ICS=2 but center at 0,0)
0.0025                             ! CF
5.0                                ! ESLM
0.0                                ! CORI
1                                  ! NTIF
M2
0.242334  1.405189e-04  0.693000  1.000000  0.000000
2                                  ! NBFR (mismatch - says 2 but only 1 follows)
M2
1.405189e-04  1.000000  0.000000
110.0                              ! ANGINN
